<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please walk through the checklist below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What does this change? Why is it useful? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the change (or there's a justification in the PR description)
- [ ] `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, `mypy`, and `pytest` pass locally
- [ ] If a Dockerfile or workflow changed, the relevant CI job is verified
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public-facing changes are reflected in `README.md` and/or `docs/`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you want feedback on, areas you're unsure about, etc. -->
